items.title: Solana volume is fragile, but traders haven’t given up – Here’s why!
items.whyYouShouldCare: Solana's trading volume shows vulnerability, indicating potential risks for liquidity and ecosystem engagement despite ongoing trader interest.

items.title: The crypto honeymoon is over for now as analysts warn of a major first-quarter profit squeeze
items.whyYouShouldCare: Analysts predict a profit squeeze in the first quarter, which could impact investor sentiment and trading activity across the crypto market, including Solana.

items.title: 'Not Going to Stop at Bitcoin': Morgan Stanley Weighs Tokenization, Tax Solutions in Crypto Push
items.whyYouShouldCare: Morgan Stanley's focus on tokenization and tax solutions signals growing institutional interest in crypto, which may enhance Solana's ecosystem and broader market adoption.
